debug_info.goal:
a : Type
x : a
xs : List a
ih : xs = fromRA (Chapter3.toRA a xs)
ds : List (Digit a)
⊢ x :: (concat1 ∘ List.map fromRA.frm) (Digit.zero :: ds) =
    (concat1 ∘ List.map fromRA.frm)
      (consRA.consT (Tree.leaf x) (List.foldr consRA nilRA ((concat1 ∘ List.map fromRA.frm) (Digit.zero :: ds))))

failed_attempts:
simp [consRA, consRA.consT]
      rw [← ih]
      simp [toRA, consRA, consRA.consT]

have h : toRA (fromRA (Digit.zero :: ds)) = Digit.zero :: ds := by
        have := congrArg toRA ih.symm
        simp at this
        exact this
      rw [h]
      simp [consRA, consT, fromRA, fromRA.frm]

have lem : ∀ {a} (t : Tree a) (ys : List (Digit a)), fromRA (consRA.consT t ys) = fromRA [Digit.one t] ++ fromRA ys := by
        intro a t ys
        induction ys generalizing t <;> simp [consRA.consT, fromRA]
        case cons d ds ih =>
          cases d <;> simp [consRA.consT, fromRA]
          rw [ih]; simp [fromRA]
      rw [lem]
      simp [fromRA]
      have ih' : xs = fromRA (Digit.zero :: ds) := by rw [ih]; simp
      rw [←ih']
      simp

simp [consRA, fromRA.frm]
    | (Digit.one t :: ds) =>
      simp [fromRA]
      induction ds generalizing t with
      | nil => simp [consRA, consRA.consT, fromRA.frm, concatMap]
      | cons d ds ih =>
        cases d <;> simp [consRA, consRA.consT, fromRA.frm, concatMap, ih]
